text:
EXPLANATION: The paper with this title was published in the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2019, but the cited author list is incorrect and excludes the majority of the actual contributors. As the authors cited do not match the real author list of the identified paper, the reference is considered a hallucinated citation.
LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v97/hafner19a.html
FOUND_TITLE: Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels
FOUND_AUTHORS: Danijar Hafner, Timothy Lillicrap, Ian Fischer, Ruben Villegas, David Ha, Honglak Lee, James Davidson
FOUND_YEAR: 2019
VERDICT: LIKELY
